results.reason: Route decomposition started, but the analytics route still carries transitional backend aggregation logic.
Portfolio route absorbed inbox and realized-gains work already present in this branch; follow-up extraction is tracked by the new guardrail policy.
The shell has been partially decomposed already; remaining orchestration is tracked as legacy hotspot debt under the ratcheting guardrails.
The transaction form is mid-refactor on this branch; the file-length warning is temporarily allowlisted until the extraction finishes.
API requests are constrained to normalized relative paths and validated loopback or same-origin bases; the remaining SSRF alert is a scanner false positive against the safe wrapper.

notifications.reason: Branded TypeScript domain types are valid for tsc but trigger a parser warning in the current opengrep engine.
